name: Freedom Holding Corp.
summary: Freedom Holding Corp. (FRHC) is a Nevada-incorporated holding company whose subsidiaries provide securities brokerage, securities dealing, market making, investment research, retail and commercial banking, and insurance products. Operating primarily in Kazakhstan and across Europe, Asia, and North America, the company also offers payment processing, entertainment and travel ticketing, e-commerce, and telecommunications and media services. Its digital platform includes Freedom SuperApp, an all-in-one financial platform for banking, payments, and investments.

products.name: Freedom SuperApp
products.description: All-in-one financial platform offering banking, payments, investment services, real-time portfolio tracking, and personalized recommendations, launched April 2024.

products.name: Securities Brokerage Services
products.description: Retail and institutional brokerage providing access to international capital markets across dozens of countries.

products.name: Freedom Bank KZ
products.description: Retail and commercial banking services in Kazakhstan, formerly Kassa Nova Bank JSC.

products.name: Freedom Finance Life JSC
products.description: Life insurance products offered primarily in Kazakhstan.

products.name: Freedom Finance Insurance JSC
products.description: General insurance products offered primarily in Kazakhstan.

products.name: Freedom Telecom
products.description: Telecommunications services in Kazakhstan, launched 2024 via acquisitions of local telecom companies.

products.name: Freedom Media LLP
products.description: Regional streaming platform targeting Kazakhstan and the broader Central Asian market.

products.name: Payment and Information Processing Services
products.description: Payment and information processing ancillary services complementing core financial offerings.

products.name: Entertainment and Travel Ticketing
products.description: Ticketing services for entertainment and travel as part of lifestyle solutions portfolio.
